reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed (non-zero callers, untrusted P2P entry point, Fusaka-specific EIP-7892 in scope). An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by configuring a bootnode for Fulu with different MaxBlobsPerBlock but same ForkVersion, causing victim nodes to connect to incompatible network and experience consensus failures. Severity downgraded from HIGH to Medium: Prysm represents ~31% of network share (below 33% threshold for High severity per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json lines 189-197). Impact limited to single client implementation.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7892: Blob Parameter Only Hardforks requires fork digest to incorporate blob params via XOR with hash(epoch||max_blobs). ComputeForkDigest (signing_root.go:304-310) only uses fork_version + genesis_validators_root, bypassing the correct implementation in entryWithForkDigest (config.go:576-590).
